Cou ie) FADE IN: ON TV SCENE 1 We see a polluted harbor. ANNOUNCER (V.O.) Live, from Springfield Harbor -- where the sewage meets the sand. A CRAB climbs out of the polluted water. CRAB (SMOKER’S COUGH; SPIT) ANNOUNCER (V.0.) It’s the Springfield Squares! The camera PANS OVER to a "Hollywood Squares" type setup on a beach. Springfield celebrities such as MCBAIN, LURLEEN LUMPKIN, TROY MCCLURE, THE CAPITAL CITY GOOFBALL, etc. are in the squares. KENT BROCKMAN, the host, is wearing a Hawaiian shirt. KENT BROCKMAN (TO CONTESTANT) Now Jacqueline, I believe it’s your turn. JACQUELINE

I’1l take Ranier Wolfcastle to block.

9F19 PINAL DELIVERY

KENT BROCKMAN Ah, Ranier Wolfcastle, star of McBain and the upcoming film, "Help, My Son Is A Nerd!"

MCBAIN My son returns from a fancy east coast college and I’m horrified to find he’s a nerd.

KENT BROCKMAN (LAUGHING) I’m laughing already.

MCBAIN It’s not a comedy.

KENT BROCKMAN Oh.

Suddenly a coast guard cutter appears in the water behind the squares.

COAST GUARD OFFICER Attention! This is the coast guard. A fifty foot tidal wave is heading this way. All game shows off the beach!

The stars start panicking. We see BARRY WHITE in an upper square, which is decorated like a "swinging singles" pad.

BARRY WHITE Everybody up to my square! It’s safe and it’s sexy. Oh baby. The panicky celebrities climb up to his square. We see a

CHARLEY WEAVER-type character in the bottom square looking crotchety.

10/2/92 2.

9F19 PINAL DELIVERY 10/2/92

MCBAIN Hurry, Charley. There is not much time. CHARLEY WEAVER TYPE I ain’t goin’ nowhere. I been in this square pert near thirty seasons and I ain’t a-leavin’ now. A wave CRASHES into hin. CUT TO: INT. SIMPSON HOUSE - LIVING ROOM SCENE 2 Homer and Bart are watching TV. HOMER He’s dead now. Homer and Bart share a LAUGH. ON TV

The word GABBO, in huge white letters, flashes irritatingly on the screen.

ANNOUNCER (V.0.) Gabbo! Gabbo! Gabbo! BACK TO SCENE Homer and Bart look at each other. BART Did you see that? HOMER Yeah. BART

What’s Gabbo?

9F19 FINAL DELIVERY 10/2/92

HOMER I figure it’s some guy’s name. (BEAT) Some guy named Gabbo. EXT. SPRINGFIELD EXPRESSWAY - DAY MARGE’S head is sticking out of the car window. MARGE Gabbo is coming? We PULL BACK to reveal that she’s staring up at a huge billboard that says "Gabbo Is Coming." A long line of cars crawls along behind her. All the DRIVERS are gaping up at the billboard. BEHIND THE BILLBOARD LOU, on a motorcycle, aims a radar gun at the traffic. LOU (READING GUN) According to the radar gun, nobody’s speeding. WIGGUM Lemme try mine. Maybe it’1l give a phony reading, heh heh.

He pulls out a gun and FIRES it, shooting tear gas into the crowd.

LOU Chief, that’s your tear gas gun. Wiggum looks at the COUGHING crowd. WIGGUM (CONT’D) Crybabies. INT. SIMPSON KITCHEN CU OF NEWSPAPER AD

It says "Gabbo Is Coming In Two Weeks."

9F19 FINAL DELIVERY 10/2/92 5.

ON HOMER He is turning the ad every which way and squinting at it. LISA I don’t think they’re giving you enough information, Dad. HOMER I'll figure it out. I’m gonna use all the power of my brain.

PAN UP and IN on Homer’s Brain. All we see is a MAN ina sombrero, snoozing under a cactus.

EXT. STREET - DAY SCENE 3 BURNS and SMITHERS pass another Gabbo billboard. BURNS Look Smithers! Garbo is coming! SMITHERS (UNCOMFORTABLE) Uh... yes sir. Burns slicks back his hair in anticipation. MONTAGE A) Newspaper headline: "Five Days Till Gabbo." B) LOVEJOY is delivering a thunderous sermon. LOVEJOY Everyone is saying "Gabbo this" and "Gabbo that." But no one is saying "Worship this" and "Jericho that." JASPER raises his hand. JASPER

What’s this about Gabbo?

9F19 FINAL DELIVERY 10/2/92

C) KENT BROCKMAN sits in front of a mortise: the word "Gabbo" surrounded by question marks.

KENT BROCKMAN Remember: Don’t look directly at Gabbo, just in case whatever he is, is too bright. Scientists recommend viewing him through a piece of smoked glass.

D) WIGGUM is looking out the window at a huge billboard that says "Watch Out For Gabbo."

LOU We got nothin’ on this Gabbo guy, Chief. WIGGUM If he’s a wanted criminal he’1l regret having put up all these billboards. E) Spinning newspaper Headline: "Gabbo Here Today!" INT. SIMPSON HOUSE - LIVING ROOM SCENE 4 The FAMILY is seated around the TV. LISA I can’t believe it. Our first glimpse of Gabbo! HOMER (PLACIDLY) He’11 tell us what to do. ON TV Spotlights play over a plush curtain. We hear a DRUM ROLL. A white Rolls Royce drives up on stage. A ventriloquist,

ARTHUR CRANDALL, gets out holding a dummy, GABBO, who resembles a young Jerry Lewis.

9F19 FINAL DELIVERY

GABBO Hello. I’m Gabbo.

CRANDALL (DISTINGUISHED VOICE) And I’m Arthur Crandall.

GABBO That’s easy for you to say. You don’t have a hand up your tuchus. (JERRY LEWIS LAUGH, NOISES)

CRANDALL (DISTINGUISHED LAUGH) Oh, Gabbo. You’1l say anything. (TO CAMERA) And you can watch us every afternoon at

four.

ON

LISA That’s the same time as Krusty the Klown!

BART Uh-oh. That cute little character could take America by storm. All he

needs is a hook.

GABBO (CUTE AND POUTY) I’m a bad widdle

boy.

ANGLE BART Looking terrified with his mouth open. INT. KRUSTY’S OFFICE - DAY SCENE 5 SIDESHOW MEL is watching TV. SIDESHOW MEL (CONCERNED) Krusty, I think you should see this. KRUSTY (V.0.) Ah, shut up. ANGLE KRUSTY He’s having his fortune told. KRUSTY Now, Princess Opal, what do you see in my future? PRINCESS OPAL turns over a tarot card. PRINCESS OPAL I see a grave threat to you. KRUSTY (SUSPICIOUS) It’s Mel, isn’t it? (TURNS) Mel, you’re fired. PRINCESS OPAL No. It comes from a talking doll.

She holds up a tarot card that looks exactly like Gabbo in "tarot" style. It’s called "The Dummy."

KRUSTY Hm. Well, I got a lotta money riding on the Rams this weekend. How does

that look?

10/2/92 8.

She holds up a tarot-style card of an unhappy clown in a barrel.

KRUSTY Ooh. There goes mom‘’s house. ON TV

The ORCHESTRA strikes up a ROUSING THEME SONG and Gabbo begins to SING.

GABBO (SINGS) You’re gonna like me/ You’re gonna love me/ ‘Cause I can do most anything... Gabbo jumps off Crandall’s lap. GABBO (CONT’D) (SINGS) ... I can do the "Hully Gully"/ I can imitate Vin Scully... Gabbo does the "Hully Gully," then speaks: VIN SCULLY VOICE Let’s take time out from this triple play to talk about Farmer Dan’s pure pork sausage. GABBO (SINGS) ... I/11 give out shiny dimes...

Gabbo flings a handful of sparkling dimes into the AUDIENCE.

GABBO (CONT’D) (SINGS) I/’11 travel back in time... Gabbo disappears for an instant, then rematerializes with a confused PILGRIM. The pilgrim waves. A battalion of SOLDIER PUPPETS marches in from stage left. SOLDIER PUPPETS (SINGING) You’re gonna like him!

A group of RUSSIAN COSSACK PUPPETS crouching and kick dancing, enter from stage right.

COSSACK PUPPETS (SINGING, RUSSIAN ACCENT) You’re gonna love him! EVERYONE (SINGING) It’s the greatest show in town! The puppets spread their arms wide and drop to one knee. Four miniature Blue Angel jets cross over the stage leaving trails of colorful smoke. INT. KRUSTY’S DRESSING ROOM SCENE 6 Krusty is taking off his makeup. MISS PENNYCANDY is there. KRUSTY That dummy doesn’t scare me. I’ve had plenty of guys come after me and I’ve buried ‘em all. Hobos, sea captains, Joey Bishop... MISS PENNYCANDY

Don’t forget the Special Olympics.

9F19 FINAL DELIVERY 10/2/92 11.

KRUSTY (REMEMBERING FONDLY) Oh yeah. I slaughtered the Special Olympics. (CHUCKLES)

A FLUNKY comes in carrying a computer print out. Krusty grabs it.

KRUSTY (CONT’D) Are those our ratings? Let me see. He looks at the ratings KRUSTY (CONT’D) (UNHAPPY NOISE) INT. SIMPSON HOUSE - LIVING ROOM - NEXT DAY

Bart, MILHOUSE and NELSON are racing HO-scale cars ona small oval racetrack. Neither car is beating the other.

MILHOUSE This is boring. NELSON I wonder what would happen if you put your train on there. Bart looks at the instructions. BART It says here, don’t. Nelson shakes his fist in Bart’s face. NELSON It says here, do!

Bart puts his locomotive on the racetrack. After a beat it starts to melt.

BART /MILHOUSE

Cool.

9F19 FINAL DELIVERY 10/2/92

NELSON Now, let’s throw some crud on it! MILHOUSE (LOOKING AT WATCH) Hey, it’s four o'clock. The boys rush over to the TV, Bart turns it on. ON TV We see the Krusty show. SCENE 7 Krusty is sitting with an old rickety dummy named ALPHONSE. He is wearing a huge moustache that completely covers his mouth. KRUSTY So you want ventriloquism, do ya? Alright watch this. (TO DUMMY) Hello Alphonse, I’ve got a riddle for you. Why is a raven like a writing desk? ALPHONSE (SLIGHTLY HIGHER VOICE) I don’t know. Why is a...

Alphonse’s jaw suddenly falls in, making him look grotesque. The kids SCREAM in terror.

KRUSTY Hey, the dummy can’t hurt you. He’s not even alive. He’s dead! Krusty KNOCKS on the dummy’ s head to show it’s made of wood. The head caves in, and the dummy’s arms spring off and CLATTER to the floor. The kids SCREAM even louder. PULL BACK to Bart watching the show. BART

(MOAN)

ON TV

A fed-up Krusty kicks the dummy into the audience. The kids SCREAM.

KRUSTY (FRUSTRATED NOISE) What a bunch of... (SEES CAMERA) Well kids, this is where you would watch Itchy and Scratchy, except they’re on the Gabbo show now. So, here’s Eastern Europe’s favorite cat and mouse team: Worker & Parasite! We see a title card in some indecipherable foreign language. Then we see an arty cartoon with moving paper cutouts of a CAT and MOUSE. They move around aimlessly, CHATTERING in weirdly pitched voices. First we see them in a factory, then standing in a food line, then struggling through a large mass of black squiggles. Suddenly the cartoon ends. A black title card says: "Endut! Hoch Hech!" ON KRUSTY KRUSTY (CONT’D) What the hell was that? ON THE AUDIENCE The kids look baffled. Some are sneaking out. KRUSTY (CONT’D) Hey! Where do you think you’re going? MONTAGE

A) We see Mayor Quimby at a podium.

9F19 FINAL DELIVERY 10/2/92 14.

MAYOR QUIMBY I admit I used the city treasury to fund the murder of my enemies. But as Gabbo would say, "I’m a bad widdle boy." The crowd CHEERS. CU NEWPAPER HEADLINE

"Quimby Re-elected By Landslide." Sub headline: "Two More Bodies Surface in Springfield Harbor."

B) Krusty speaks earnestly to the camera. KRUSTY All right, here’s the deal. Every time you watch my show, I will send you $40. Krusty holds up a check. COMMERCIAL ANNOUNCER (V.0) (QUICKLY) Checks will not be honored. SUPER: CHECKS WILL NOT BE HONORED C) We see a Graumann’s Chinese type theater. One cement block reads: "To Sid, Friends for Life, Krusty." Below this are Krusty’s hand and foot prints. A workman pours wet cement over it. Gabbo puts his hands and feet in the new cement, as the crowd APPLAUDS. GABBO (RAUCOUS LAUGH) Everybody likes the printing. He signs his name. ON STAGE SCENE 8

We see Krusty in a dark suit and shades a la Nixon in the final days.

9F19 FINAL DELIVERY 10/2/92 15.

KRUSTY Mel, get down on your knees and pray with me.

MEL But I’m an atheist.

KRUSTY I said pray!

MEL Dear Lord, even though I don’t recognize your existence...

Krusty shoves Mel down on his knees. Two NETWORK EXECUTIVES quietly approach Krusty.

NETWORK EXECUTIVE #1 Krusty, we’re from the network. We have some bad news. I’m afraid your show has been --

Krusty puts his fingers in his ears.

KRUSTY I’m not listening. If I don’t hear you, I’m not cancelled. (HUMS)

NETWORK EXECUTIVE #2 Krusty, please. This is not a classy way to end thirty-five years of televison.

Krusty SINGS to the tune of "Alouette."

9F19 FINAL DELIVERY

KRUSTY (SINGING) I’m not cancelled/ La la la la la la/ I’m not cancelled/ I don’t care what you say...

NETWORK EXECUTIVE #1 Krusty, we’re pulling the plug.

He pulls a giant plug and all the lights go out and the camera goes off.

We PAN over to the audience. It is empty, except for a sad-looking Bart.

On a LONG PULL OUT, we see Krusty sitting alone, on stage, SOBBING softly.

FADE OUT

END OF ACT ONE

ACTRESS Oh Kyle, I just don’t think I fit in here at Melrose Place. KRUSTY From now on, I’11 be doing the thinking for both of us.

He kisses her. His nose presses against her face and HONKS slightly.

Krusty is excitedly trying to root his horse home. He waves his ticket.

KRUSTY Come on! You stupid horse! I got my last ten bucks on you! No, don’t look at me! Run! (BEAT) No! Don’t come over here! (MOANS)

Bart, Lisa and GRAMPA are watching Gabbo on TV. Homer is reading the newspaper.

Hello. Is this Krusty the Klown?

KRUSTY (V.O) Is this the callback for that porno film? Look, I was a little nervous that day. But I’m all man, I can assure you...

GABBO No, I represent a Japanese camera company. We’d like to pay you two million dollars to do a camera commercial.

KRUSTY (V.0O.) Whoa! Me rikey velly much. (THEN, DESPERATE) I hope I didn’t offend you. I need this bad.

GABBO Bad enough to hit yourself over the head with the phone?

KRUSTY (V.0O.) You got it. (HITTING NOISE) Ow. (HITTING NOISE) Ow. (REALIZING) Ew, blood.

Gabbo and Crandall break out LAUGHING as well as the kids in the audience.

stealing my bit.

Bart, Lisa, and Krusty enter the apartment. It is a mess, littered with old newspapers, pies, Popsicle sticks etc.

KRUSTY (SADLY) Thirty-five years in show business and already no one remembers me. Just like what’s his name... and whosis... and you know, that guy, always wore a shirt... BART Ed Sullivan? Wow! I didn’t know you knew Bette

Midler.

Bart points to a picture of LUKE PERRY. It has darts in it.

ACT THREE FADE IN: EXT. FREEWAY SCENE 15 A billboard reads "LITTER REMOVAL NEXT TWO MILES COURTESY OF BETTE MIDLER." Bart and Lisa are standing next to Bette Midler, who is picking up trash along the highway with a long pointed stick. LISA I think there’s a cigarette butt on the center divider. Bette Midler runs out into traffic to pick it up. She is nearly run over by a truck, but she spears it with her stick and returns. BETTE MIDLER Got it. BART You could have been killed! BETTE MIDLER (SIGHS HAPPILY) We’re Americans. We

deserve clean highways.

TWO YOUNG MEN drive past in a pick-up truck. They throw a beer can out the window.

BETTE MIDLER (CONT’D) You pigs! She picks up the can and runs after the truck. She grabs onto the rear view mirror and pulls up to the cab. JAILBIRD is driving. JAILBIRD Oh nooo! Bette Midler.

She throws the can back at them, then heads back to Bart and Lisa. She resumes picking up trash.

BETTE MIDLER (SWEETLY) Now where were we?

LISA We were asking you to appear on Krusty’s come back special.

BETTE MIDLER (ANGRILY) No! I wanted to be Tina Ballerina, forever. And he took that away from me.

BART Krusty didn’t know what he was doing. That was the year he was hooked on that muscle relaxant.

LISA Yeah. Remember he gave all his money to Reverend Ike?

BETTE MIDLER (THINKS) Okay. Tell Krusty he can count me in.

A coke can is tossed out of another pick-up truck and rolls up to Bette Midler’s feet. She picks it up.

BETTE MIDLER (CONT’D) (GRIM) It’s time to take out the trash.

She throws the can at the speeding truck. It flies into the cab. The truck goes out of control.

9F19 FINAL DELIVERY

DRIVER (V.0O.) (DOPPLER EFFECT) I/11 get you for this, Midler... The truck SMASHES into a mountain, and EXPLODES. INT. TOUR BUS SCENE 16

A TOUR GUIDE is pointing to a large mansion as a group of TOURISTS in the bus look on.

TOUR GUIDE And off to your left is Hugh Hefner’s Shelbyville Pad. INT. PLAYBOY MANSION Hugh Hefner is showing Bart around. They are both wearing smoking jackets and PUFFING on pipes. (Bart’s is a bubble pipe.) HUGH HEFNER A lot of people know about the grotto and the game room... BART Of course. HUGH HEFNER But few know about the laboratory, the biosphere, the alternative energy research center...

Bart looks in the laboratory and sees PLAYBOY BUNNY SCIENTISTS hard at work.

BART Fascinating. They walk on. Bart fills his pipe (REFILLING NOISE). Bart

looks out the window at a large gray structure on the mansion grounds. He points at it with the stem of his

pipe.

10/2/92 31.

9F19 FINAL DELIVERY 10/2/92

BART (CONT’D) Desalinization plant? HUGH HEFNER (NODS) Yes. The grotto uses so much water... the bunnies felt we should go this way. BART Smart bunnies, Hef. I can call you Hef, can’t I? HUGH HEFNER No. EXT. ELIZABETH TAYLOR’S HOUSE - ESTABLISHING We see her name on the mailbox. INT. ELIZABETH TAYLOR'S HOUSE Elizabeth Taylor is wearing rubber gloves and HUMMING while she carefully polishes her Oscars. She wears her ring on the outside of her glove. Her AGENT comes in. AGENT A couple of grade school kids wanted you to be on a Krusty special. I told them to buzz off. ELIZABETH TAYLOR Good. EXT. MOE’S TAVERN SCENE 17

The sign on the front reads "Tonight Only: "The Red Hot Chili Peppers."

INT. MOE’S TAVERN

THE RED HOT CHILI PEPPERS stand looking angrily at MOE.

32.

9F19 FINAL DELIVERY 10/2/92 33.

ANTHONY KIEDIS You told our agent this place holds thirty-thousand people.

MOE (LYING) It does. We had thirty thousand here last night. Now play. The audience is getting restless.

We see the audience consists of BARNEY sitting on one folding chair.

BARNEY We want Chilly Willy! We want Chilly Willy!

BART Hey, Red Hot Chili Peppers. Would you guys like to appear on a Krusty

the Klown Special?

FLEA (ASIDE) Sure -- if you get us out of this gig.

BART

No problemo. (POINTS) Hey, Moe! Look over there.

Moe looks in the other direction. Bart motions for the band to sneak out the door.

MOE What?... What am I lookin’ at? I don’t see nothin’. I’m going to stop

looking soon. What? What, is that it?

9F19 FINAL DELIVERY 10/2/92

Moe continues to look in the other direction. INT. KRUSTY’S APARTMENT

There is a brief KNOCK on the door, then Bart and Lisa race in.

BART Krusty! We’ve got great news! (YELLS)

Krusty has ballooned up like Elvis. He’s sitting on the floor with dozens of empty cups around him.

KRUSTY (BLOATED NOISE) LISA Krusty! What have you done to yourself? KRUSTY I thought I’d get into shape so I’ve been drinking nothing but milkshakes. LISA You mean those diet milkshakes? KRUSTY Uh-oh. MONTAGE A) INT. SIMPSON HOUSE - DAY SCENE 18 Krusty stands with a suitcase. HOMER Now, you can stay with us until you lose that weight. You can sleep on

the sofa, it folds right out.

34.

9F19 FINAL DELIVERY

Homer pulls at the sofa, GROWLING. He rips stuffing out with his hands.

HOMER (CONT’D) Oh, wait. That was the old sofa. B) Krusty and Marge are wearing matching leotards in the Simpsons’ living room and doing head rotations. Marge’s hair KNOCKS items off shelves, the CAT dodges her with a YOWL, etc. C) Krusty tries to HIT Homer in the face with a pie. Homer is open mouthed. Krusty misses and throws the pie in the garbage. Homer looks very disappointed. KRUSTY (MOANS) I’1l never get my aim back. BART You’ve got to keep working on it. Bart takes a hot pie out of the oven. Krusty HITS Homer with it. Homer SCREAMS, then makes delighted CHEWING NOISES. HOMER Mmm, delicious.

D) Krusty is stuck in a tiny clown car. WORKMEN are using the jaws of life to extract him.

WORKMAN Don’t worry, Krusty. We’1l have you outta there in no time. Inside the clown car, we hear another CLOWN. CLOWN (V.O.) (DROOPY VOICE) What about the rest of us? KRUSTY

Wait your turn, Bobo.

10/2/92 35.

9F19 FINAL DELIVERY 10/2/92 36.

CLOWN (V.0O.) Up yours Krusty.

E) Homer and Krusty are both in boxing trunks, sparring. MAGGIE is watching TV.

KRUSTY Oh, why am I bothering? It’s hopeless.

A Gabbo promo comes on television.

GABBO (V.0.) Hi kids! It’s me, Gabbo! (IRRITATING, ALMOST NASTY, LAUGH) Ha ha ha ha ha ha ha hi ho!!

Krusty starts HITTING Homer furiously. An alarmed Maggie switches the channel on TV with the remote.

ON TV

A NEWSMAN sits in front of a mortise of a pork chop and an arrow pointing up.

NEWSMAN Pork prices rose in early trading today. BACK TO SCENE A GROWLING Homer starts pummeling Krusty furiously. EXT. GULP ’N BLOW INT. GULP ‘’N BLOW - CONTINUOUS SCENE 19

Krusty, Bart and Lisa are talking to Sideshow Mel, who is wearing a badge identifying him as “Assistant Manager Mel."

KRUSTY But you've gotta come back, Mel!

We're a team.

9F19 FINAL DELIVERY

MEL No, Krusty. You always treated me rather shabbily. On our last show you poured liquid nitrogen down my pants and cracked my buttocks with a hammer. KRUSTY Come on, you wanna waste your life hanging out with a bunch of dorky teenagers? A teenaged COUNTER BOY approaches Krusty. COUNTER BOY (TEENAGE VOICE) Here’s your taco, Mister. It falls out of his hands into the fryer. COUNTER BOY (CONT’D) Oops. It fell in the fryer. I/11 get it out. (MOANS) (MOANS AGAIN) MEL Sorry, Krusty. I like it here. Mr.

Johannson treats me with dignity.

MR. JOHANNSON walks up and puts his arm around Mel.

MR. JOHANNSON Is this clown bothering you, Mel? MEL That’s all right, Mr. Johannson. I/11

handle it.

9F19 FINAL DELIVERY 10/2/92

The counter boy approaches with Krusty’s taco. COUNTER BOY Here’s your taco, sir. KRUSTY I don’t want it. COUNTER BOY But this comes out of my salary. If I had a girlfriend, she’d kill me. CU NEWSPAPER SCENE 20 Headline: "Krusty Special Airs Today!" Below this is another headline which reads: "Gabbo to Have ‘Real Boy’ Operation." INT. THE KRUSTY SHOW - ON STAGE - REHEARSAL Krusty is making a crude balloon animal. KRUSTY Look, kids. (BALLOON NOISES) A horsie! And what are you making, Sideshow Luke Perry?

PAN OVER to LUKE PERRY dressed like Sideshow Mel. He has twisted a balloon into the shape of a merry-go-round.

LUKE

(BALLOON NOISES) A 19th Century

carousel.

He turns it and it moves; the horses go up and down.

KRUSTY

Upstage me, will ya! Get the hell

out! LUKE

Why do you hate me?

38.

9F19 FINAL DELIVERY 10/2/92

KRUSTY ‘Cause you got the looks and the charm, and what did I get? Bupkis! LUKE PERRY Bupkis? Bupkis? Krusty, you had all the things I wanted. Like... Uh -- that cool bubble pipe. KRUSTY That was for asthma! Asthma! (COUGHS) He pulls out an inhaler and uses it. LUKE PERRY Now look, there must be something I can do on the show. (BEAT) Please. (BEAT) For Mom’s sake. KRUSTY (DISGUSTED) Well... maybe we can find something.

Krusty imagines Luke Perry being FIRED out of a cannon directly at a brick wall.

LUKE PERRY IN DREAM (SCREAMS) BACK TO SCENE KRUSTY (CHUCKLES) LUKE PERRY

Thank you, Herschel.

9F19 FINAL DELIVERY 10/2/92

KRUSTY Quiet, Shlomo. EXT. KRUSTY THEATER SCENE 21 There is a huge line for Krusty’s show. No one is waiting in line for the Gabbo Show, across the street. Crandall and Gabbo are standing outside smoking and looking at the line. GABBO I don’t like it. He’s got Johnny Carson, Bette Midler AND Hugh Hefner. What’ve we got? CRANDALL Ray Jay Johnson. Gabbo’s head spins around miserably. GABBO (UNHAPPY SPINNING NOISES) INT. STAGE - DAY Krusty comes up to the Red Hot Chili Peppers. KRUSTY Now boys... uh... the network has a problem with some of your lyrics. Would you mind changing ’em for the show? ANTHONY KIEDIS Forget you, clown. CHAD SMITH Hey, our lyrics are like our children

man, no way.

40.

9F19 FINAL DELIVERY 10/2/92 41.

KRUSTY Well okay. But here where you say "What I got you gotta get and put it in you," how about just "what I’d like is I’d like to hug and kiss you"? They look at each other. FLEA Wow, that’s much better. ARIK MARSHAL Everyone can enjoy that. ANTHONY KIEDIS We have been getting a lot of flak about our questionable lyrics. Think you could tone ’em down? He hands Krusty some sheet music. KRUSTY If I have time. FLEA There‘s more in the car! INT. KRUSTY SHOW

Krusty stands in front of seven foot high letters that say "Krusty." He begins SINGING his signature tune.

KRUSTY (SINGING) Send in the clowns/ those daffy, laffy clowns/ send in those soulful and doleful, shmaltz-by-the

bowlful clowns/ Send in the clowns...

9F19 FINAL DELIVERY

Mel walks in, dressed in his Sideshow Mel costume. MEL (SINGING) They’re already here...

Krusty and Mel hug affectionately. The crowd goes crazy with emotion and excitement.

MEL I love you Krusty. KRUSTY Quiet! MONTAGE Of exciting scenes from the Krusty Special. A) Luke Perry, wearing an old fashioned leather helmet and a white suit with "Luke" in sequins across his chest, climbs down into the muzzle of a cannon. Krusty gets ready to light the fuse. KRUSTY (LOOKING AT AUDIENCE) Are you comfortable in there, Luke Perry? LUKE PERRY (MUFFLED) Fire away, Krusty. Luke Perry is SHOT out of the cannon, through a window in the back of the auditorium. We hear a body HIT the pavement and slide, and a car SLAM on its brakes. LUKE PERRY (0.S.) My face! My valuable face! KRUSTY (NERVOUS LAUGH) (UNHAPPY NOISE)

B) Red Hot Chili Peppers are in their underwear, PLAYING "Give it Away." Krusty looks concerned off stage.

KRUSTY (LOUD WHISPER) Psst!

10/2/92 42.

9F19 FINAL DELIVERY 10/2/92

CHAD SMITH What’s the matter? KRUSTY (LOUD WHISPER) You’re in your underwear! Chad Smith ignores hin. KRUSTY (CONT’D) Oh, those poor kids. SCENE 22

C) Johnny Carson stands on stage in a suit. A car is behind him.

KRUSTY Now, Johnny, whatcha got for us. Some jokes -- a little magic? JOHNNY Actually I thought I’d lift this 1987 Buick Skylark over my head. Johnny lifts the car over his head. KRUSTY Hi yo! Johnny, that’s amazing! JOHNNY Oh yeah? Get a load of this.

Johnny starts SINGING opera (we dub in an opera singer’s voice). He spins the car as he does so.

D) Elizabeth Taylor is watching the show at home as she polishes a huge diamond with a toothbrush. She holds the diamond up to her eye briefly and we see 50 violet eyes. She looks over to see Hugh Hefner playing glasses by rubbing the rims. The audience APPLAUDS.

43.

9F19 FINAL DELIVERY 10/2/92 44.

ELIZABETH TAYLOR I’ve got to fire that agent. E) Bette Midler is on stage with Krusty. As she SINGS to him he listens emotionally, head in hand, as in the Bette Midler/Johnny Carson moment on the Tonight Show. BETTE MIDLER (SINGING) Did you ever know that you’re my hero? Krusty nods. He knows. BETTE MIDLER (CONT’D) (SINGING) You’re everything I would like to be? KRUSTY (SINGING) You can fly higher than an eagle... BETTE MIDLER & KRUSTY (SINGING) Cause you (I) are (am) the wind beneath my (your) wings. They are softly SOBBING. The audience CHEERS wildly. BETTE MIDLER This was a great show, Krusty. You

deserve an Emmy for this.

9F19 FINAL DELIVERY

KRUSTY Forget it. The Academy hates me. I don’t know why. Bunch of old, know- nothin’ dinosaurs wouldn’t know entertainment if it bit ’em in the (SEES CAMERA) Hey hey! INT. MOE’S - NIGHT SC 23 The wrap party for the Krusty Show is in progress. There is a banner hung over the bar that says "Congratulations Krusty." Hugh Hefner is trying out the Love Tester and is obviously not very happy with the result. Bette Midler is flattening empty beer cans with her hand and sticking them in a recycling bucket. Krusty is with Johnny Carson. JOHNNY Now, Krusty, I just hope you remembered to save your money this time. Miss Pennycandy approaches Krusty. MISS PENNYCANDY Here’s that ruby-studded clown nose you ordered, Krusty. (HOLDS IT UP) KRUSTY (UNHAPPY NOISE)

The Red Hot Chili Peppers walk in, in their underwear. They AD-LIB "Hey Moe" etc. Moe sees them.

MOE (ANGRILY) You guys!

Moe BREAKS a beer bottle on the bar and brandishes the jagged edge at the band.

10/2/92

45.

9F19 FINAL DELIVERY 10/2/92 46.

ARIK MARSHALL (THINKING FAST) Phone call for you, Moe. Arik hands the phone to Moe. Moe listens. MOE Hello? Hello? All I hear is a dial tone. If someone doesn’t start talking soon I’m hanging up. This isn’t gonna last much longer. Hello? He continues to listen to the phone. The band sneaks off. ON BART & LISA Krusty walks up to them. KRUSTY I’m a star again. (WARMLY) I don‘t know how to thank you kids. BART That’s alright, Krusty. LISA We’re getting 50% of the T-shirt sales. KRUSTY (MAD) What!? That’s the sweetest plum. You... little... (THEN) Ahh. What the hell. You deserve it. Thanks kids.

Krusty PATS their heads affectionately.

9F19 FINAL DELIVERY 10/2/92 47.

KRUSTY Alright, everybody get together for a picture. (BEAT) Come on, squeeze in there Bette. Krusty runs up to a camera, sets the timer then runs back. He is about to take a picture of Bart, Lisa, Krusty, Johnny Carson, Bette Midler, Luke Perry, Hugh Hefner and The Red Hot Chili Peppers. Elizabeth Taylor looks in through the window. BART (POINTS DOWN) Hey look at that, someone dropped a Golden Globe award! Everyone bends down to get it, except Bart. We see all the celebrities’ backsides but Bart, who remains standing. He LAUGHS and waves. FREEZE FRAME

FADE OUT
